expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the section "### Case focus coverage: “final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording”" explicitly addresses both parts: (1) "Preserves layering (final layered structure)" with an enumerated layering chain and reference to "final layering validators", and (2) "Executable wording (atomic action steps + observable expected results)" citing required "nested atomic action steps" and "observable verification leaves" and "no legacy `Action:` / `Expected:` labels".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: result.md states "## Primary phase under test: Phase 6 (final quality pass)" and then enumerates Phase 6 contract elements: "Phase 6 outputs (required): `drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md`, `context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md`" plus "Phase 6 post-gate" requirements. execution_notes.md likewise says it evaluated "Phase contract alignment to Phase 6" and notes blind_pre_defect limits to contract/rubric coverage rather than runtime artifacts—consistent with Phase 6 focus.
